2606.07882.title: The Cross-Architecture Substrate: A Domain-Transcendent, Calibration-Surviving Geometric Invariant of Modern Vision Encoders
2606.07882.paper_summary: Different vision neural networks -- trained to classify, contrast, reconstruct, or match images to text -- should have correspondingly different internal representations. We report that they do not. After training, the top sixteen principal directions of variation inside thirteen modern vision encoders converge to the same sixteen-dimensional geometric object. We call this the cross-architecture substrate and study it with PCA, centred kernel alignment (CKA), and Pang 2026 calibration. The substrate transports across four visual domains (natural photographs, medical CT, satellite, microscopy) at median Procrustes-CKA 0.679, and across eight domains (adding sketches, depth, thermal infrared, astronomy) at 0.604, every pair >0.40. It survives Pang calibration globally (7.4x disc-vs-MAE separation, n=13,394) and locally (4.82-5.30, p<10^{-44}). It is not pixel statistics (0.263), not Gabor features (0.31), not a random projection (0.041), and emerges in the first 10% of training while accuracy keeps climbing. We deliver four applications: a label-free transferability filter beating LogME (3x faster, +0.15 Kendall-tau); a four-way domain detector (99.6% accuracy); a frozen low-shot probe (16 dims beat 768-dim DINOv2 by 3.78pp at N=50 labels per class); and a teacher-free distillation auxiliary matching trained-teacher KD on 33 pairs (7.56pp peak gain at 10% label fraction). The substrate does not cross modalities, does not help cross-paradigm distillation, and does not predict transfer quality (rho=0.08 against transfer accuracy).
2606.07882.paper_summary_zh: 不同的視覺神經網絡——經過訓練以分類、對比、重建或將圖像與文本匹配——應該擁有相應不同的內部表徵。<lb/>我們報告說它們並非如此。<lb/>經過訓練後，十三個現代視覺編碼器內部的前十六個主變異方向收斂到同一個十六維幾何物體。<lb/>我們稱之為跨架構基質，並使用主成分分析（PCA）、中心核對齊（CKA）和Pang 2026校準來研究它。<lb/>該基質在四個視覺領域（自然照片、醫療CT、衛星、顯微鏡）中的中位Procrustes-CKA為0.679，在八個領域（增加素描、深度、熱紅外、天文學）中的中位數為0.604，每對均大於0.40。<lb/>它在Pang校準中全球生存（7.4倍的圓盤與MAE分離，n=13,394）和局部生存（4.82-5.30，p<10^{-44}）。<lb/>它不是像素統計（0.263），也不是Gabor特徵（0.31），也不是隨機投影（0.041），並且在訓練的前10%中出現，而準確率持續上升。<lb/>我們提供四個應用：一個無標籤的可轉移性過濾器，超越LogME（快3倍，+0.15 Kendall-tau）；一個四路領域檢測器（99.6%準確率）；一個冷凍低樣本探針（16維超越768維DINOv2，提升3.78個百分點，N=50標籤每類）；以及一個無教師蒸餾輔助匹配訓練教師KD在33對上（10%標籤比例下的峰值增益7.56個百分點）。<lb/>該基質不跨模態，不幫助跨範式蒸餾，並且不預測轉移質量（rho=0.08對於轉移準確率）。
2606.07882.author: Yousef Radwan et.al.
